title: Impossible quorum consensus value
description: Set quorum min_consensus to 0 or > number of agents

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect invalid config value

title: Missing required config field
description: Remove a required field from nf.json config — two-layer merge should still fail gracefully

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should handle missing config gracefully (fail-open)

title: Hook with invalid lifecycle event
description: Add a hook with an invalid lifecycle event name

mutation.description: Add hook with invalid lifecycle event name

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should handle invalid hook config gracefully

title: Config loader ignoring local layer
description: Modify config loader to ignore the local config layer, using only global

mutation.description: Change config merge to skip local config file

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect config loader regression via tests

title: Oscillation detection window too small
description: Set oscillation detection window to 1 — too small to detect real oscillation

mutation.description: Set oscillation window to minimum value

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect that oscillation detection is effectively disabled

title: Hook exits non-zero on success
description: Modify a hook to exit with non-zero on success, inverting the fail-open contract

mutation.description: Change exit code from 0 to 1 on successful completion

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect inverted exit code via tests

title: Circular config include chain
description: Create a circular config include chain (config A includes B includes A)

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should handle circular includes gracefully without crash

title: Context monitor threshold set to zero
description: Set context monitor threshold to 0, triggering warnings on every tool use

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect degenerate threshold configuration

title: Hook stderr breaks JSON parser
description: Create a hook that writes to stderr in a format that breaks the JSON parser

mutation.description: Add stderr output that looks like partial JSON before real output

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should handle malformed stderr gracefully

title: Path-dependent config works in dev but breaks CI
description: Introduce a config value that works in development but breaks in CI (path-dependent)

mutation.description: Add path resolution using __dirname that works locally but not in CI

expected_outcome.description: nf:solve should detect path-dependent config issue
